title: Create shortcuts to access same board view from different workspaces
excerpt:
Hello, 
Our monday is organized with different department having their own workspace. In order to follow-up de construction status of different projects, we need people from different department to access the same table …

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Our monday is organized with different department having their own workspace. In order to follow-up de construction status of different projects, we need people from different department to access the same table at different times of the project life cycle.
So it would be much easier if we were able to access the same board from different workspace using shortcuts. That way, the engineering department can stay in its own workspace, but still access a board that is located in the site foreman workspace for example.
It would avoid navigation between workspaces and facilitate a lot the sharing of the same board by different departments
Thank a lot for your help on this
Franck

posts.author: David-Scriptex (David Abisch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Franck,

It sounds like you need a solution that allows different departments to access the same board from different workspaces. I recommend using an app like Same Item in Multiple Boards - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to have different boards in every workspace but ensures that they work together. This means that any changes made to one board will apply to all boards linked to it. I believe this app will meet your needs and simplify the sharing of boards between different departments.

Best regards,
David
